sharedPost.text:
Wir sind hoch erfreut! Ab Dienstag (28. Juli 2026) wird unser neues Album "Farblos" auf alles gängigen Streamingdiensten verfügbar sein. 12 Songs, inklusive der Single "Letztes Licht". Neue Melodien, klang- und kraftvolle Arrangements!
-----
We are thrilled! Starting Tuesday (July 28, 2026), our new album "Farblos" will be available on all major streaming services. 12 songs, including the single "Letztes Licht." New melodies, and arrangements rich in sound and power!
-----
Nous sommes ravis ! À partir de mardi (28 juillet 2026), notre nouvel album « Farblos » sera disponible sur toutes les principales plateformes de streaming. Il comprend 12 titres, dont le single « Letztes Licht ». Au programme : de nouvelles mélodies ainsi que des arrangements riches en sonorités et en puissance !
-----
Siamo entusiasti! A partire da martedì (28 luglio 2026), il nostro nuovo album "Farblos" sarà disponibile su tutte le principali piattaforme di streaming. 12 brani, incluso il singolo "Letztes Licht". Nuove melodie e arrangiamenti ricchi di sonorità e potenza!
-----
Мы в восторге! Со вторника (28 июля 2026 года) наш новый альбом «Farblos» будет доступен на всех основных стриминговых сервисах. В него вошли 12 композиций, включая сингл «Letztes Licht». Вас ждут новые мелодии и мощные, насыщенные аранжировки!

@Follower TopFan Friends
#ravensdiary #farblos #newalbum #neofolk #darkfolk #avantgarde

https://ravensdiary.de

Jackson on test mode 🎸🔥
After the setup, it’s time to play and check every detail: action, tuning stability, intonation and feel.
This is the final test to make sure the guitar responds the way it should and is ready to rock.
Need your guitar sounding and playing better?
DM me for guitar setup, fretwork, electronics and repairs.

CASTING CALL - VOLUNTEER
Hi all! We are looking for some more roles to fill in for ‘The Museum of Admirable Suffering’, a film created by a passionate crew of CapU alumni and students

This call is for the roles of a couple: we are open to anyone interested that fits the role. It is volunteer and for 1 day only among the 4 shooting dates.

(We posted calls for our other characters a few days ago, if you’re interested check those out if you haven’t!)

If you are interested please email or dm me your headshots and a reel if you have one:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

>>PAID WORK!<<

Non-Union ONLY!

Looking for CHALLENGE PA's - to help test our challenges!

Must be fearless and take anything we throw at them! Will need to be ok with Swimming, Heights, Extreme physical challenges, pain, claustrophobia, eating gross things, ok with bugs and animals etc.

🌟 LOCATION: BRITANNIA BEACH, BC 
(and surrounding area. Must be a BC resident to apply)

📅 Dates Needed: 
Multiple Dates Available from July 22-Aug 31, 2026 
No Travel Pay

🌟 Ages: 19-60s, Any Genders and Any Ethnicities

Rate of Pay: 25$/hour Min 6 hours pay
Must be available up to 12 hour days. 

To apply, Please fill out the application link here: 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc3gDdTqhF-odPO5Xwmov1JWs-wK4LyL8Pjn6f5X4tf6Psq6g/viewform

Don’t miss this opportunity to be a part of something special. Apply now!

items.text:
📸 PHOTOGRAPHER CREW CALL
📍 Zuma Malibu, California

Smyles Entertainment is currently assembling a small team of photographers for our upcoming Spotlight Saturday community event on Saturday, August 22.

This is an opportunity to expand your portfolio while collaborating with current and aspiring and experienced models, actors, hair & makeup artists, and fellow creatives in one of Southern California’s most iconic coastal locations.

We’re intentionally keeping our photographer team small and currently have 4 photographer spots available.

This opportunity is a great fit for:

* Photography students

* Emerging photographers building their portfolios

* Creatives interested in fashion, portrait, beauty, and entertainment photography

We’re looking for photographers who:

* Have a passion for photography and creativity

* Are dependable and professional

* Enjoy directing both new and experienced talent

📍 Location: Zuma Malibu, California

🗓️ Date: Saturday, August 22

💼 TFP

For more information, please email crew@smylesentertainment.com.

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL FOR FEATURE FILM IN LOS ANGELES**

**Project:** TOMORROW MORNING

**Format:** Independent Feature Film

**Genre:** Psychological Drama

**Location:** Los Angeles

**Length: **2-Day-Shoot 

**Shot in: **Real time to represent a 24-hour time frame

**Non-Union:** With pay, meals, and digital copy

**Pay:** **Principal **- $400 for 2 Days

**Non- Principal** - $75 for 1 Half-Day

**Synopsis: **As reports of war, unrest, and catastrophe dominate the nightly news, a religious, agoraphobic couple withdraw further from friends and family and prepare for the upcoming apocalypse they believe is taking place outside their front door.

**Principal Roles:**

**JOHN** (52), the husband, he’s a thoughtful, intelligent man who has spent years trying to reconcile world events with Biblical prophecy. He isn't charismatic or fanatical; he's methodical. He's calm, articulate, affectionate, and emotionally available. He isn't a fire-and- brimstone preacher. He's a husband trying to make sense of a world that increasingly feels broken.

**MARY **(50), the Wife, she is warmer than John and less analytical. More emotionally intuitive. Her faith isn't intellectual. It's relational. She doesn't need notebooks or timelines. She simply trusts. Unlike John, she doesn't need evidence. She needs reassurance. She becomes the emotional heart of the film because she genuinely grieves for everyone she believes will be left behind.

**Non-Principal Roles:**

**DAVID** (30), John's Best Friend, Dead for 20 years from an overdose. Appears only to John. Not frightening. Not ghostly. Comfortable. Natural.

**JESUS** (33), Never portrayed as spectacular. He appears exactly the way someone Mary has loved her entire life might appear. Soft. Patient. Listening more than speaking.

**GRACE **(28), the daughter, she represents: ordinary life continuing. She loves her parents. Had this conversation before. She’s stopped trying to convince them.

**JAMES** (25), the son, More confrontational. Not angry. Heartbroken.He's the final emotional attempt to pull them back into reality. Unlike the daughter, he refuses to give up.

**FATHER THOMAS** (55), the Pastor, He's compassionate. Patient. He’s trying to save two friends. He believes scripture. He simply doesn't believe Revelation is unfolding tomorrow.

**DR. WILLIAMS** (46), the Neurologist, Black. Professional. Empathetic. The rational counterweight. Never dismissive. He explains their mindset as being a medical condition.

**Submit: **Reels & Resumes by Aug 31st to: donotdisturbfilms@gmail.com

topComments.text: Oh this looks like a beautiful film. I would so love to be apart of it. I will be sure to send in my portfolio to the email provided

**LEKTORZY POSZUKIWANI**

Do rolek na social media (tematyka motoryzacyjna) poszukuję lektorki oraz lektora:
1. Lektor - 8 zdań
2. Lektorka - 15 zdań

items.text:
Casting call: 7/20-8/1
Atlanta it’s that time again! Our short film The Airport Job  is casting for several roles! We are seeking actors of all skill levels to shoot with us October 2 - October 4 in ATLANTA, GA!! These are PAID roles & we are able to offer free professional headshots, IMDb credits, & footage for your reel. 

LOGLINE: Desperate for work, a young Brooklyn woman takes a night-shift airport security job under false pretenses — only to be ground down by exhaustion, exploitation, and a harrowing act of public indecency, before finally reaching a breaking point that costs her the job and nearly costs her more.

Moe: black woman age 20-35 
Main character, sassy, Spicy, kinda introverted & reserved at times yet toxic…. From Brooklyn NY.  

Ma aka Nette: black woman age 40 plus. 
Spicy & sarcastic. From Brooklyn NY 

Supervisor 2 aka Winston: male (Indian preferred or close to it) mid 40’s in age. Very mild mannered & reserved. Has a controversial scene 

The man: Male age 20-45 non speaking but controversial. He does something in public that ppl wouldn’t like. 

Vincent: male. Mid 40’s 
flirty & persuasive 

Submit your headshots to movies@millenniproductions.com. Should you have any questions, call/text 678 491 6064

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting for another commercial that is filming in the Detroit, MI area .
Please read carefully below for details!

DETAILS:
Project: 'Democratic Ad' Commercial
Filming Location: Detroit, MI Area (MUST LIVE IN MICHIGAN)
Shoot Date(s): Wednesday 7/22/26
Rate: $900 + 10% Agent Fee (Up to 2 hours of work MAX)
Usage: Would air on digital platforms (YouTube, Hulu, meta) from now through the election.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

WOMAN:
Age: 18-25
Gender: Female
Ethnicity: Caucasian OR African American

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:
In order to submit for this project, you will need to film a self-tape
talking about the importance of voting in the next election. Just 20 seconds is fine with a slate (see instructions below).

Please send your video to team@angelaboehmcasting.com. Also, please attach a headshot and full-body photo along with your tape!

SUBJECT LINE: "Democratic Ad Submission - YOUR NAME"
Slate Instructions: Please list your Full Name, Location (must live in Michigan), Phone Number & if you have an agent!

Audition Directions:
- Please do not tape outside
- Please have a blank background
- Please put slates at the end of the audition.
- Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!

DEADLINE: EOD TODAY, 7.20.2026!!!

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

items.text:
Hey there. We’re now casting for a Japanese / English dating show. Shooting in London later this year! 

We’re looking for participants:

1 Female (20-30), Japanese

1 Male (20-30) any background, British

1 Male (20-30) any background, European

1 Male (20-30) any background, Japanese 

Show will be in mix of English and Japanese languages. If interested to be in it contact me at hank@sanrokuku.com

Please put “Project Love” in the subject line and email your headshots and a little about you. It will be a fun project to work on and our goal is to stream it online. It’s unpaid opportunity and to accommodate everyone’s busy schedules we will be shooting on weekends. Application deadline is July 10.

sharedPost.text:
✨ Walk the NYFW Runway Experience with Matilda Couture by My Little Matilda ✨

We invite aspiring models to be part of an unforgettable New York Fashion Week modeling experience on September 12th and 15th, as Matilda Couture by My Little Matilda presents its exquisite designs on the runway.

This is your opportunity to experience the world of fashion like a professional model — featuring professional hair and makeup, professional photography, and the excitement of walking a real NYFW runway in front of a live audience.

A garment fee applies for this exclusive runway experience.

Whether you dream of becoming a model or simply want to celebrate a special milestone, this is a memory you will cherish for a lifetime. Just like investing in a theater performance, a dance recital, or any meaningful artistic experience, modeling is a skill, an art form, and a beautiful opportunity to build confidence and create memories you can share with family and friends.

✨ Live the model life. Walk the runway. Create your NYFW story. ✨

Matilda Couture by My Little Matilda
Where dreams become couture.

#MatildaCouture #MyLittleMatilda #NewYorkFashionWeek #NYFW #ModelExperience RunwayModel AspiringModels FashionDreams CoutureFashion

items.text:
🌍 Excellence isn't a destination—it's a daily habit.

Every routine we perform is powered by discipline, trust, and the passion to inspire. At Tanzania Boys Circus, we are proud to showcase the beauty of African acrobatics and create unforgettable moments for audiences around the world.

✨ Every performance is a celebration of courage, teamwork, and determination.

🎪 Available for festivals, corporate events, schools, tourism shows, cultural celebrations, weddings, birthdays, and private events.

📲 Book Tanzania Boys Circus today: +255785917491

🌟 Tanzania Boys Circus — Inspiring the World, One Performance at a Time.

items.text: Min værelseskammerat insisterer på at lade smørret stå på køkkenbordet, fordi 'det er sådan, de altid har gjort det'. Men er det faktisk sikkert at lade smørret stå fremme? Jeg nægter at bruge det, og hun bliver ret ked af det.

topComments.text: Nej det bliver hurtig harsk, specielt hvis man har det ude når der er så varm som det er nu. Tag det ud af køleskabet 10 min før man skal bruge det

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Lader smorret stả pả kokkenbordet: Ja eller nej?'

**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION BRAND VIDEO**

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Burnaby, BC

**Shoot Date:** August 26, 2026 (3-4 hours, depending on role)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $300

**ROLES:**

• **The Broker** — Age **25–35** | Male, ethnicity open

• **The Waitress** — Age **35–50** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL — COSMIC HORROR SHORT 🎭

We're extremely excited to be casting our upcoming cosmic horror proof-of-concept short, RIFT — and we're searching for the right performers to bring this haunting story to life. 👁️

Logline: A grieving artist tries sketching her late wife's memory and instead opens herself to a trapped child's spirit, luring her toward a hole into darkness that may cost her soul.

We're seeking:

DAWN | Lead | 30s | Female

A grief-stricken artist and psychic sensitive.

MYRA | Lead (Supernatural) | 30s | Female

Dawn's deceased wife — calm, tender.

SERENA | Supporting (feature potential) | 50s | Female

Dawn's mentor and guide in psychic practice — elegant and composed.

THE CHILD | Supporting (Non-verbal) | 18+ (playing 10) | Female

A silent, uncanny spirit-child who lures Dawn. (Adult actor portraying a younger character.)

The details:

📍 Location: Burnaby, BC

📅 Shoot Dates: August 5 & 6

💰 Volunteer / deferred payment positions

🍽️ Hot meals, credit, and footage for your reel provided

We genuinely appreciate anyone interested in collaborating and helping us tell this story. 🖤

To audition: Email your headshot, reel, and resume (if available) to cosmeumproductions@gmail.com with your requested role in the subject line.

#CastingCall #IndieFilm #CosmicHorror #HorrorShort #Actors #VancouverActors #BurnabyBC #Filmmaking #IndieHorror #ProofOfConcept #NowCasting

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

CASTING CALL🎬
Hi everyone!

We’re looking for background dancers and actors to be part of our upcoming short film on July 29th!

🎬 Date: July 29
💃 Looking for: Background dancers & actors
🍴 Non-paid (crafty/food will be provided!)

If you’re interested in being part of the project, we’d love to have you! Please email Hankvienna25@gmail.com for more information.

See poster below for details. Thanks! 😊

❗️POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW - WARSZAWA❗️
POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW 

WARSZAWA - PIĄTEK 16:00-20:00

Do realizacji etiudy operatorskiej IV roku Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy statystów.🎬

▪️6 osób (ok. 30-60 lat)

Ⓜ️pasażerowie komunikacji miejskiej (tramwaj, peron metra)

▪️Ze względu na dość skromny budżet oferujemy symboliczną stawkę. Ponadto zapewniamy doborowe towarzystwo oraz niezapomniane doświadczenie filmowe! 

▪️Jeśli jesteście w trakcie budowania swojego CV artystycznego jest to idealny projekt dla Was!

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o bezpośredni kontakt za pośrednictwem fb lub maila oraz o załączenie portfolio.

📩mail: zuzannna.kubanska@gmail.com

Do zobaczenia na planie!🤗

CASTING CALL – NON-UNION TABLE READ

RAKSHAS DRISHTI

Horror • Mythology • Supernatural

Trilokam Entertainment is seeking passionate actors for an exciting virtual table read of our original proof-of-concept film!

Wednesday, July 29, 2026

 7:00 PM – 9:00 PM (PT)

Zoom

Now Casting:

 Lead Roles: Southeast Asian Men (ages 28–38)

 Supporting Roles: All ethnicities, ages, and experience levels welcome

Voice Actors

 Creature & Movement Performers

Child Actor (7–10)

Please Note:

Non-Union

Table Read is Unpaid

Actors cast in the filmed Proof of Concept will receive paid roles.

📧 Submit to: trilokamcasting@gmail.com

Subject: Rakshas Drishti Submission

Please include:

• Headshot

• Resume (if available)

• Contact Information

 Submission Deadline: Sunday, July 26, 2026

Step into a world where ancient evil walks among us and help bring Rakshas Drishti to life.

#CastingCall #NonUnion #ActorsWanted #SanDiegoActors #ZoomCasting #TableRead #HorrorFilm #Mythology #VoiceActors #CreatureActor #TrilokamEntertainment #RakshasDrishti

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — Scottish Short Film, July 2026**

Looking for an older Scottish or British man (60s–80s)

The role: a weathered coastal crofter — dignified, quiet, lived-in. No acting experience necessary, but the right face and presence are everything. Height approx. 177–186 cm.

The film is non-commercial, directed by Luis Räder / LXR Films (lxr-films.net). Portfolio piece, published on YouTube. Costume provided. Travel expenses covered and a small honorarium included.

Shoot: Auchindrain Township, Argyll, 17 July 2026. Night interior shoot (approx. 22:00–04:30). This is an unusual schedule — please only get in touch if this works for you.

If this sounds like you or someone you know, please get in touch via DM or email: LXR-Films@web.de

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – ON-CAMERA TALENT 

We are looking for charismatic men and women to appear in short-form video advertisements for a premium water filtration brand.

We are NOT looking for traditional commercial-style performances.

We're looking for people who can make scripted content feel authentic, natural, and engaging, as if they were sharing a personal discovery or useful recommendation with a friend.

✅ Strong on-camera presence
✅ Natural communication skills
✅ Acting, presenting, hosting, or public speaking experience is a plus
✅ Ability to deliver believable and relatable performances

**Project Details**
* Vertical videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook, YouTube Shorts)
* 30–90 seconds per video
* Remote work
* Ongoing collaboration possible

**Important:** The script and creative brief will be provided to selected candidates.

**To apply, please send:**
1. A short introduction video (30–60 seconds)
2. Examples of previous on-camera work (acting, presenting, content creation, etc.)
3. Your rate per video

We are primarily looking for charisma, authenticity, confidence, and strong storytelling ability on camera.

Please apply on the email: juliette@puurefilters.com

Thank you :)

sharedPost.text:
🎬 URGENT LOS ANGELES CASTING CALL – FRIEND GROUPS OF 3 TEENS (AGES 13–16)
We're casting real friend groups of three for a Claire's Ear Piercing Campaign!
✨ Pay: $600 per person for the visual shoot.
✨ If your group is selected for the social media/email campaign, each person will receive an additional $2,500. (Selection for the social/email campaign is not guaranteed.)
Who We're Looking For:
Real friend groups (ages 13–16)
Girls, boys, co-ed, and LGBTQ+ groups are all encouraged to submit
Outgoing, playful personalities with genuine chemistry
Comfortable being yourselves on camera
Excited to celebrate a milestone together with a shared piercing experience
You may already have your ears pierced and can receive an additional piercing if selected. One friend—or all three—may choose matching earrings.
We're looking for friends celebrating life's big moments, such as:
Birthdays
Graduations
Finishing middle school and starting high school
Personal achievements
Any exciting new chapter worth celebrating
We want your friendship to feel authentic, spontaneous, and full of fun, confidence, and excitement.
Bonus!
If your friend group loves documenting life with a camcorder, disposable camera, or Polaroid, we'd love to see that in your self-tape!
In Your Self-Tape, Please Answer:
1. What's the funniest thing that's ever happened when you were all together?
2. Who's the "bad influence" (in the best way)?
3. Who would be the first one in the piercing chair?
4. What is everyone doing after this next chapter?
5. If your friend group had a group chat name, what would it be?

📧 Submit your self-tape by Tuesday, July 21, 2026, at 12:00 PM (Noon)
Email: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

Everyone In LA

items.text:
Casting Call!
 Models  for Kindness Campaign. 

💙 Models for Kindness 💙 By My Little Matilda Matilda Model Magazine Model Society Club Matilda Couture 

“Kindness never goes out of style.”

International models are coming together to promote kindness, compassion, and respect for one another through the Matilda Model Magazine Kindness Campaign.

Meet our inspiring ambassadors:

📅 July 19

📍 Billboard Location: Orlando, Florida

✨ The billboard will play for 8 seconds several times throughout the day in a high-traffic area near Walt Disney World and Universal Studios, reaching visitors from around the world.

Together, we’re proving that kindness is always in fashion. Join us in spreading positivity around the world—one act of kindness at a time. 💖

#ModelsForKindness #KindnessNeverGoesOutOfStyle #MatildaModelMagazine #KindnessCampaign #InternationalModels

items.text:
Some actors find their niche. I love finding new lives to step into. With my natural nails, hair and teeth, I've got a perfect face for period pieces. 

From the ghetto of the 1950s (typo on the picture) to casual grace in the '60s, a housewife navigating change in the '70s, and the unforgettable style of the '80s,  (don't I look just like Murphy Brown?) every decade tells a different story—and every role is a chance to bring another woman to life.

One of my favorite things about acting is how a costume, a hairstyle, and a script can transport you to another era. It's a reminder that while times change, the human experience—love, loss, ambition, humor, resilience—never goes out of style.

Here's a look at a few of my favorite period roles. Which decade is your favorite?

I'm always excited for the next story waiting to be told.

#ActorLife #CharacterActor #PeriodPiece #VintageStyle #FilmActor #TelevisionActor #TheatreLife #ActingJourney #WomenInFilm #CastingReady #OnSet #BehindTheScenes #Storytelling #QueensActor #NYCActor #EraFashion #1950sstyle  #1960sStyle #1970sStyle #1980sStyle

topComments.text: Nobody had cat eve glasses in the 1930s
Your awesome!!!! I love this!!! I’m a 59 plus actor as well and I find it a blast being able to portray different people and eras!!!!

items.text:
Cześć! 😊
Nazywam się Dominik Kusajda i szukam możliwości rozwoju aktorskiego oraz udziału w ciekawych projektach filmowych.

Mam doświadczenie przed kamerą, m.in. zagrałem rolę mówioną w serialu, a obecnie jestem zainteresowany udziałem w filmach krótkometrażowych, etiudach studenckich, reklamach, teledyskach oraz innych produkcjach.

Bardzo chcę rozwijać się w aktorstwie, zdobywać nowe doświadczenia i współpracować z ciekawymi twórcami. Jestem osobą otwartą, pozytywną, szybko się uczę i dobrze odnajduję się w pracy z ludźmi.

Jeśli ktoś szuka aktora do swojego projektu albo wie o trwających castingach, będę bardzo wdzięczny za kontakt. Chętnie podeślę zdjęcia, CV aktorskie oraz materiały.

Pozdrawiam i do zobaczenia na planie! 🎬

Dominik

sharedPost.text:
Niedoszła aktorka Karolina Bojarska ma poniżej 15 lat.
Mam nadzieje, że chociaż trochę rozmawiasz ze swoimi dziećmi o tym, co się dzieje w sieci, bo czasem Twoja córka może dać taki post jak widać na załączonych zrzutach. Otóż Karolina Bojarska od prawie dwóch dni daje ogłoszenia na grupach aktorskich związanych z produkcją filmową posty o stałej treści „Nastolatka zapozuje lub zagra w filmie. Zgoda jest. Jestem poczatkująca. Priv.” Niestety jest problem.

Wcale bym się nie zdziwił, gdyby Karolina była Karolem, lub Konradem. Dosłownie wcale, gdyż zdjęcia wykorzystane w tym świeżym koncie są wygenerowane przez AI. Na nieszczęście osoby, która za tym stoi zorientowałem się od razu. Poza tym wrzuciłem zdjęcia gdzie trzeba, a wynik działania, którym jest 97% przedstawiam chociażby na dole.

Wpierw chciałem jednak poznać prawdę i tak oto wysłałem zaproszenie, aby zwrócić uwagę na siebie i mój PRIV, a później zamieściłem także komentarz na grupie, z której tej post zniknął. Reakcja ze wczoraj omawianej „Karoliny” była jedyna, bo wycofano zdjęcia z profilu i sam post. Dzisiaj jednakże fikcyjna małoletnia powróciła. Postanowiłem znowu zapytać, ale tym razem pod nowym postem i … zostałem zablokowany.

Osoba odpowiedzialna za to, to ktoś szukający osób chcących od małoletniej „czegoś więcej” niż one chciałyby dać, więc poniekąd jest to pozytywne działanie, aczkolwiek dziecinne. Niestety o tym nie wiedziałem, bo jako chociażby admin jednej z grup, gdzie post się pojawił powinienem zostać powiadomiony, gdyż mógłbym utrudnić działanie. Po prostu nie dopuszczam postów osób małoletnich.

Innym wytłumaczeniem może być robienie sobie legendy, w której oficjalnie bliżej nie określona małoletnia szuka sobie miejsca przed kamerą. Z jej poziomu nawiązuje kontakt z innymi małoletnimi i tak kontakt się kręci, ale w jaki sposób, to już co innego.

Tutaj oczywiście można też dyskutować nad tym tematem, ale na ten czas jest to jedna z w/w opcji. Tak, czy inaczej, na grupach, gdzie adminuję, czy też sprawuję jakakolwiek władzę nie dopuszczam postów autopromocyjnych od małoletnich. Poza tym takowe dość niedojrzałe działanie wiąże się z brakiem profesjonalizmu, więc jak dla mnie to stoi za tym „samotny wilk”.

Na koniec jeszcze nadmienię, że konto, gdy zwróciłem na nie uwagę miało 43 znajomych, a teraz ma ich … 233!!

#karolinabojarska #ai #sztucznainteligencja

Jeden dzień zdjęciowy w centrum Warszawy / niedziela 26.07 

Projekt z super ekipą, udział barterowy, materiał do portfolio. 

Zapraszam!

items.text:
🎥 Program randkowy 🎥
Cześć!

Do randkowego programu telewizyjnego poszukuję singli w różnym wieku - kobiet i mężczyzn świadomych swojego ciała i otwartych na tematykę cielesności i nagości.

Program bez podtekstu seksualnego, promujący pozytywne podejście do ciała, cielesności i nagości.

Pokazujący, że różnorodność jest czymś wyjątkowym i pięknym. 

🎥 Nagrania mamy w Warszawie pod koniec sierpnia. 

Zapraszam odważne osoby chcące przeżyć jedyną w swoim rodzaju przygodę przed kamerą 📽️

Osoby zainteresowane udziałem serdecznie zapraszam do kontaktu 😊 📩

Poszukuję zdolnej epizodystki która wcieli się w rolę "Szkolnej gwiazdy"
Produkcja Trudne Sprawy
Wiekówka 18-19 lat. (Powinna wyglądać na 17 lat )
Terminy 31 lipiec oraz 1,2 sierpnia 
Proszę osoby tylko z doświadczeniem na planie 
Na emial adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl 
Lub na priv z dopiskiem miasto wiek i jakie doświadczenie na planie.
Wynagrodzenie gotówka.
Hotel po stronie firmy.
Miejsce nagrywek Wrocław.
Zapraszam do kontaktu!

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Call for Auditions: Black Mountain by Brad Birch To be staged 25th- 28th November 2026 at The Victoria Institute, Arundel. A taut psychologica thriller: α couple retreat to an isolated cabin to repair their relationship- only to discover the past won't stay buried. As memories surface and footsteps close in, betrayal and the possibility of forgiveness collide. Casting 2 2xFemale- playing age 30s-50s 1x Male playing age 30s-50s A ead-through and casting session will take place on: Wednesday 22nd July 2026 7.00pm The Victoria Institute, Tarrant Street, Arundel For further information, please contact: Deni Jones: 07760 948550.'

sharedPost.text: "If you have ever longed for a story that captures the spirit, sharp wit, and deep emotional resonance of Elizabeth Bennet, Beyond Harmony: The Road to Harmony, is your next unforgettable escape. It invites you to step past the Regency ballroom doors and into a world where true love is tested by the harshest realities of history."

items.text:
🎅 **Father Christmas Casting Call – 2026**
Evoke Entertainment is currently seeking **experienced Father Christmas actors** for a series of festive grotto activations across the UK.

📍 **Location**

We are casting for the following areas : 

- MORETON-IN-MARSH, GL56

- GLOUCESTER, GL2 

🗓️ **Key Dates **

- Friday 4th Dec 

- Saturday 5th Dec

- Sunday 6th Dec

- Thursday 10th Dec

- Friday 11th Dec

- Saturday 12th Dec

- Sunday 13th Dec 

- Thursday 17th Dec

- Friday 18th Dec 

- Saturday 19th Dec 

- Sunday 20th Dec 

- Monday 21st Dec 

- Tuesday 22nd Dec 

- 

 ⏰ **General Schedule**

* Grotto operating hours typically **between 8:30am – 6:00pm (maximum shift length)**

* Some **shorter days may apply**, to be confirmed via email

- Please note that dates will vary across the 2 venues 

💼 **Requirements & Rates**

* **Rate of pay is £35 per hour**

* Actors with **their own beard preferred**

* Suit provided

---

 📩 **How to Apply**

Please email: **[castings@evokeents.com]

**Subject line:** *Father Christmas 2026 (VENUE)*

Include:

*Your preferred shifts

* Any relevant experience or details

We will respond with full availability schedules and next steps.

topComments.text: Well done for paying a good rate!! You should get some top Santas for that!
Always a great company to work for

items.text:
✨ Open Casting Call ✨

Romance Series (Pilot Episode)
Potential for multiple episodes.

We're casting for the pilot episode of a new romance series, with plans to continue into multiple episodes.

The story follows Andy and Jessica, who meet at a bar, instantly connect, and end up spending a romantic evening together.

Filming: Late September 2026
Location: Manchester

We are looking for three actors to play the lead roles of Andy, Jessica, and Sasha.

Manchester-based actors are preferred, but performers from all locations are welcome to apply.

Open Casting:

The casting session will take place in Manchester city centre.

To register your interest and receive more information, please send your CV and headshots via Instagram to:

Producer: @aiechaonfilm
Director: @aatifatizafarofficial

Please Note:
This is an ambitious production with high creative standards, and we're looking for dedicated performers who are excited to help bring these characters to life.

The pilot episode is UNPAID 
Although future episodes have very high potential to be payed. 

Catering will be provided. 

Roles:

Jessica
Playing Age: 20–30
An intelligent, confident woman who always knows what she wants. She has a magnetic presence and naturally commands attention whenever she enters a room.
Character Inspiration: Jessica was loosely inspired by Megara from Disney's Hercules. 
We have no appearance preferences, we're looking for the right performance and delivery.

Andy
Playing Age: 20–30
A clumsy yet charming businessman who is still trying to find his place in the world. He's genuine, likeable, and struggles to wear his heart on his sleeve.
No appearance preferences, performance and delivery are what matter most.

Sasha
Playing Age: 20–25
A quirky bartender with a quick wit and a sarcastic sense of humour. Sasha brings energy and comic relief while still feeling grounded and authentic.
No appearance preferences, we're looking for strong character delivery.

We look forward to hearing from you!

topComments.text: Hi there, I'm interested. Just wanna ask if its possible to send in to an email? It may be easier to send in my materials. Thanks.

**🎬 CASTING CALL – PAID SHORT FILM 🎬**

We're casting for a **paid short film** shooting in **North London** during **August/September**.

**Role:**
• **Male**
• Playing age: **Mid-20s**
• **Long or medium-length hair**

If you're interested, **send me a message on Messenger** for more details, including the script, shoot dates, and audition information.

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who might be a good fit!

items.text:
EXTRAS CALL OUT FOR SHORT FILM:

Hello, 

Hope this find you well!

I’m currently producing a short film titled ‘A Funny Thing’ and we are needing extras to act like as onlookers on the street. 

Filming is 2nd August 12-4pm 

We are wanting a diverse cast as the film is set in London 

Location: North London, Tottenham 

Unfortunately unpaid but we can cover travel up to £5 and food is provided. 

Please send headshot and spotlight/anything similar to [beckidouglass@icloud.com](mailto:beckidouglass@icloud.com) by 30th July to be considered 

Kind regards 

Becki xx

topComments.text: You should have left the £5 part out. Nobody is gonna take this. Pretty sure the minimum for the Underground is 6

Calling Female Dancers - 6 Month Contract Mumbai, India 🇮🇳
Apply now to appear in Bollywood Film Shoots, Music Videos, VIP events, IPL cheerleaders and unforgettable experiences and opportunities ✨ 

You’ll get the chance to work with the biggest names and choreographers in India 🇮🇳 

✅ Accomodation 

✅ Food

✅ Flights 

✅ Visa 

6 months in India = unforgettable experiences 🙌 

To apply please send CV, Showreel and headshots to info@taylormadeglobal.co.uk (MUST BE 5’5 & OVER) subject: MUMBAI 

#mumbai #castingagency #dancers #internationaldancer #castingcall

items.text:
Hey guys- I’m new here 

Please allow me to introduce myself - my name is mariah lacey Lila https://app.spotlight.com/5094-1207-2084

Mariah lacey has a natural ability to portray powerful women navigating leadership, loyalty and moral conflict.

Mariah Lacey is a London-based actor with a natural ability to portray emotionally complex women whose strength, intelligence and vulnerability exist side by side. She brings grounded authority, emotional depth and authenticity to every performance, and her work lends itself to period drama, fantasy, historical drama, psychological thrillers and contemporary character-driven stories.

Recent theatre credits include Kate in How to Date a Feminist at the New Wimbledon Theatre and Nurse and Benvolio in Romeo and Juliet with Bowler Crab Theatre Company, following the company's five-star recognition at the Shakespeare Festival. Alongside her performance work, Mariah is the founder of the emerging theatre company Outcasts and is currently developing its debut production.
Mariah has been recalled by reputable Casting Directors, including Jeremy Zimmerman, Nick Young theatre Director- Trained with RSC Company, and Karmel Chocrane she has received consistent positive feedback on her work.
Alongside her screen and stage work, she is trained in Shakespeare, stage combat, immersive theatre and voice acting, enabling her to move confidently between historical, fantasy and contemporary worlds.

ALESSI HARTIGAN CASTING

CASTING ADAM SANDLER LOOKALIKE FOR INTERNATIONAL COMMERCIAL!
 
•  Males ages 50-60s
•  Heights ranging from 5’8”-6’0”
•  Weights ranging from 150-190
•  No experience necessary 

LOCATION: New Jersey 
DATES: TBD during 2nd week of August
RATE: $4,000

PLEASE EMAIL SUBMISSIONS BY:
Tuesday July 21st, 2026 12:00PM

HOW TO SUBMIT:
Please email the following information to KCMO@ahartcasting.com
Subject Line: Lookalike

1. Full name
2. Contact details (phone number, email address)
3. Sizes (height, weight, suit, pants, & shoe size)
4. Current Selfie (with no hats or sunglasses against a plain white background)
5. City & State you currently live in

items.text:
CREW CALL: Production Sound Mixer & Sound Editor (LA Area)
Looking for a Production Sound Mixer / Sound Recordist for an upcoming LA-based, non-union short film (proof-of-concept, ~15–20 mins). We are a self-funded, passion-driven team shooting a tight, high-tension crime thriller across 4 weekend days.

PROJECT DETAILS

Genre: Crime / Thriller / Neo-Noir

Logline: When a brutal mob hit forces two close-knit LAPD detectives into a web of paranoia, a routine witness interrogation uncovers a dark betrayal that pits them against a ruthless international syndicate—and each other.  

Tone: High-tension, grounded realism.

SHOOT SCHEDULE

Total: 4 Days (Weekends)

Days 1 & 2: August 15 & 16 (Sat/Sun)

Days 3 & 4: September 5 & 6 (Sat/Sun)

Looking for an emerging Production Sound Mixer with their own kit for a low-budget, high-concept proof-of-concept.

Stipend: Small Kit/Gas Stipend

Breakfast + Lunch provided on set

Credits: On-screen & IMDb credit

Location: Los Angeles Area.

If you’re interested, please text me with a brief intro, a link to your work, and your gear list.

P.S. Also looking for a skilled SFX Makeup Artist to round out the team! If you specialize in realistic practical effects (blood, trauma, cuts) and want to showcase your work in a festival thriller, please feel free to message me!

items.text:
*****As of this posting, there are 11 spots left for auditions*****

**CASTING NOTICE**

San Diego, CA

Non-Equity Call; $50/performance

Trinity Theatre Company is seeking actors to fill all roles for *Dead Man’s Cell Phone* by Sarah Ruhl, directed by Sean Boyd and performing October July 12, 2026.

**Auditions:** In-Person appointments on August 5th. Please prepare a 1-2 minute monologue of your choice. Submissions are being taken online through [Sign Up Genius](https://www.signupgenius.com/go/8050C48AEAD2CA4F49-64799444-auditions). All submissions must be submitted through this platform. ([https://www.signupgenius.com/go/8050C48AEAD2CA4F49-64799444-auditions](https://www.signupgenius.com/go/8050C48AEAD2CA4F49-64799444-auditions))

Prior to auditions, you will be emailed to submit a *digital *copy of your headshot & resume. Hard copies are not required, and will not be taken.

**Important Dates** for *Dead Man’s Cell Phone*:

September 15 - October 4, 2026 – First Rehearsal

October 5 - October 15, 2026 – Tech Rehearsal

October 16 - October 25 – Performances

All Rehearsals & Performances will take place at the Trinity Theatre Company, 1640 Camino Del Rio N, Suite 129, San Diego, CA 92108.

Rehearsals Tuesdays - Fridays from 6p-10p.

Performances Fridays & Saturdays at 7p; Sundays at 2p.

**Character Breakdown:**

****Actors of all ethnicities, race, age, and gender are encouraged to apply****

JEAN* - *a woman

*GORDON *- a dead man

MRS. GOTTLIEB - Gordon’s mother

HERMIA - Gordon’s widow

DWIGHT - Gordon’s brother

THE OTHER WOMAN - Also plays the stranger. Has an accent.

*About the Show:*

An incessantly ringing cell phone in a quiet café. A stranger at the next table who has had enough. And a dead man – with a lot of loose ends. So begins Dead Man’s Cell Phone, a wildly imaginative new comedy by MacArthur “Genius” Grant recipient and Pulitzer Prize finalist Sarah Ruhl. A work about how we memorialize the dead – and how that remembering changes us – it is the odyssey of a woman forced to confront her own assumptions about morality, redemption, and the need to connect in a technologically obsessed world.

items.text:
Am I the A**hole or...?”  

 

🥴 Have you ever done something that you felt was TOTALLY justified but on telling others, are met with cries of: “you did WHAT?!”  

 

😯 Maybe you have a dating story which, on paper, doesn’t sound so great but when you explain the context you were definitely in the RIGHT?!  

 

😏 Perhaps you and your partner have an ongoing debate about something that shouldn’t be a big deal but really, really is? Do you want it settled once and for all and to know who is actually right? (you, obvs).  

 

Well, who better to cast judgement than Jimmy Carr! This is the show that will finally give you the validation you crave... (or not).  

 

Produced by Tuesday’s Child for Comedy Central, Am I The A**Hole is a studio-based comedy entertainment show, inspired by one of Reddit’s most successful subreddits, bringing its distinctive brand of humour and judgement to TV.  

 

📺 Casting is underway and we are looking for a broad range of people to apply, either as an individual or as a duo – couples, family, housemates etc; as long as you’re over 18 and living in the UK. We would love to hear from anyone interested, filling out the application won’t mean an obligation to take part but does mean our team will be able to reach out to you for a chat.  

 

Filming will be taking place in July, 2026 and successful cast will be paid. Casting is already underway, so get your application in ASAP.  

 

🔗https://shortaudition.com/AITAS2

items.text:
Hej! 👋

Szukam fotografa lub fotografki chętnej/go na sesję TFP.

Jestem makijażystką i chciałabym zrobić sobie kilka profesjonalnych zdjęć wizerunkowych do portfolio oraz na social media. Zależy mi na prostych, estetycznych kadrach – np. portrety, zdjęcia z pędzlami i kosmetykami, najlepiej w studiu.

Nie szukam sesji z modelką ani zdjęć z wykonywania makijażu – chodzi o zdjęcia mnie jako makijażystki. 😊

Chętnie podejmę współpracę także z osobą, która dopiero rozwija swoje umiejętności i buduje portfolio.

Jeśli ktoś byłby zainteresowany, zapraszam do wiadomości prywatnej. 🤍

items.text:
Dzień dobry,

poszukujemy dwójkę dzieci ( max 2,5 lat albo żeby na tyle wyglądało ) do udziału w 15-sekundowym spocie telewizyjnym realizowanym w ramach kampanii społeczno-edukacyjnej „Z.N.A.K.I. – widzieć więcej, wspierać mądrzej”.

Spot pokazuje naturalną, codzienną zabawę rodzica z dzieckiem -między innymi samochodem, misiem lub klockami. Nie przedstawiamy w nim żadnej choroby, diagnozy ani sytuacji medycznej. Chodzi o zwykły, ciepły obraz rodziny i wspólnego spędzania czasu.

Wynagrodzenie za udział wynosi **1 500 zł ( **za jedno dziecko** )**, na podstawie umowy o dzieło. W przypadku udziału dziecka wszystkie wymagane zgody i dokumenty podpisuje rodzic lub opiekun prawny. Przy czym będę też wymagane zaświadczenia od psychologa i lekarza ( nic skomplikowanego ) o tym że dziecko może uczestniczyć w nagraniu. Niestety jest to wymagane prawnie  i sama zgoda rodzica nie wystarczy, wymagana jest też zgoda PIP.

Umowa obejmuje udział dziecka w nagraniu oraz zgodę na utrwalenie i wykorzystanie jego wizerunku i udziału w finalnym spocie. Spot może być wykorzystywany w telewizji oraz w internecie, w Polsce i bez ograniczeń geograficznych w publikacji online, w ramach działań społecznych, edukacyjnych, informacyjnych i promocyjnych kampanii. Szczegółowy zakres zgód i wykorzystania wizerunku zostanie opisany w umowie.

Do nagrania są 4 sceny gdzie dziecko się bawi - nic skomplikowanego i wymagającego od dziecka jeżeli chodzi o samo nagranie. Wszystko odbywa się w jednej lokalizacji. 

Terminu niestety nie mogę jeszcze określić bo wszystko jest zależne od decyzji PIP na którą czeka się nawet miesiąc. Na pewno do końca sierpnia chcemy mieć już skończone zdjęcia.

W przypadku wyboru dziecka do udziału rodzic lub opiekun prawny będzie musiał być obecny na planie zdjęciowym.

Nie będę czytać wiadomości pod postem. Proszę pisać na e-mail

hello@luon.studio

🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM

Child Supporting Artist

We are looking for a boy aged 6–8 years for an upcoming feature film.

Requirements
• White Caucasian
• Dark hair (to match the older version of the character)
• Able to perform a handstand and/or cartwheel
• Must be local to the Christchurch/Bournemouth area

Dates
📍 Costume Fitting: 29th July – Shepperton Studios
🎥 Filming: 1st August – Christchurch/Bournemouth area

⏰ URGENT – Applications close TODAY at 1:30pm Tuesday 21st July 

If your child fits the brief and is available on the above dates, please email a recent headshot to info@sallykingagency.com with your child’s name, age, location and contact details.

We look forward to hearing from you.

#castingcall #childactor #bornmouth #christchurch #Pool #Dorset #casting #film #TV  #filming #deadline

Is your headshot due for an update?

Your headshot is often your first audition, so make sure it reflects who you are today.

We're excited to be holding our next MP Management Headshot Photo Shoot on Sunday, August 9.

Whether you're an existing MP Management artist, a newly signed talent, or an actor, performer or professional looking for a fresh, industry-standard headshot, we'd love to see you there.

Professional photographer and studio located in Cheltenham.
A standard headshot is only $79. Suitable for adults and children. Perfect for acting, modelling, and casting profiles.

Places are limited and booking out quick, so click the link below to secure your preferred session.

media.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎'স্টার ইনস্টিটিউট অফ অ্যকিং স্বপ্ন আপনার, দায়িত্ব আমাদের! বিশেষ অফার: কোর্স চলাকালীন নিশ্চিত কাজের সুযোগ! ভ্র্তি ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- ثث মাসিক ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- অনলাইন এবং অফলাইন কোর্স ১০০% কাজের সুযোগ (ফিচার ফিলা, ওয়েব সিরিজ, সিরিয়াল) থিওুরি এবং প্র্যাটিক্যাল শিক্ষা গুণী শিল্পীদের সান্নিধ্যে প্রশিক্ষণ ভিড় না হারিয়ে, নিজেকে গড়ে তুলুন STAR INSTITUTE ACTING OF ভ্তির জন্য যোগাযোগ করুন E 9432846525 হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: 9432846525‎'‎

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – THE MAGICAL WOODLAND 2026 🎄🎃
We have just a few castings remaining for this year’s Magical Woodland!

Join our immersive woodland light trail where guests journey through a magical forest, meeting interactive characters, creating unforgettable memories, and bringing the magic to life.

📍 Location: Magical Woodland, Northwich, Cheshire, CW8 2EB

🎃 HALLOWEEN

Event Times: 6:00pm – 10:00pm

Performance Dates:

9th, 10th, 11th, 16th, 17th, 18th, 23rd–31st October & 1st November

🤡 Silly Clown (Any Gender)

We’re looking for someone bursting with personality and energy! This role is perfect for a confident improviser who isn’t afraid to be silly, interact with guests, create laughs, and fully embrace the fun.

⸻

🎄 CHRISTMAS

Event Times: 4:00pm – 10:00pm

Performance Dates:

November: 20th, 21st, 22nd, 27th, 28th, 29th

December: 4th, 5th, 6th, 11th, 12th, 13th, 14th, 15th, 16th, 17th, 18th, 19th, 20th, 21st, 22nd, 23rd & 24th

🎀 Cindy-Lou (Female-identifying Role)

A sweet, smiley and larger-than-life character who absolutely adores Christmas! We’re looking for someone expressive, full of energy, and able to captivate guests with exaggerated movement and joyful interaction.

💚 Who with the Grinch (Any Gender)

An energetic performer to entertain guests while they queue to meet the Grinch. You’ll help manage crowds, create magical interactions, and support the Grinch throughout the experience.

🪼 LED Sea Creature (Any Gender)

A highly physical improvisation role with large movements, strong character work, and plenty of audience interaction. High energy is essential!

❄️ Ice Queen (Female-identifying Role)

A graceful, regal character with elegant, slow movements. You’ll create magical moments through improvisation while maintaining a warm and enchanting presence.

🎧 Elf – Silent Disco Host (Any Gender)

Help run our brand-new Silent Disco! You’ll be signing headphones in and out, assisting with crowd management, encouraging guests to join in, and keeping the energy high on the dance floor.

⸻

✨ HOW TO APPLY

Please email S.H.Events@outlook.com

Subject Line: The role you are applying for

Please include:

* Headshot

* CV

Successful applicants will be invited to submit a self-tape for the role.

We can’t wait to see your submissions and welcome more talented performers to the Magical Woodland family!

Shane Hurst Events

Casting Call!

Short Film - Wine Before a Funeral

Role - Dead Woman 

Age range - 25 - 35

Location Cookham

Submission ASAP 

Contact wjdonahue99@gmail.com 

this a passion project and is unpaid unfortunately 

I am casting for the role of Dead Woman. This character is a vital part in a two hander that I am writing, directing and co-staring in.

to apply all you have to do is say a little something about your self share any previous work that your proud of and record yourself reciting the character monologue that is attached below.

sharedPost.text:
Working on something more lyrical in this Summer heat!! 🥵🔥 Still getting a good workout in though……whilst exploring and developing our artistry! 🙌 

Because this is a DANCE class, not a dance-fitness workout. COMPLETE beginners are welcome here! We work to levels that assist and stretch everybody. You’ll get a great workout, sure! But you’ll get so much more besides. Come and try out your new favourite thing to do!

If you’re interested, come and give it a go! First class just £3. - The style changes every few weeks. (Take a look at our other videos.) 

#danceclass #fitnessjourney #beginnersclass #newhobby #meetnewpeople

items.text:
Hi all,

We’re still looking for as many extras as possible for a short Horror film we’re shooting this Thursday at The Hope Street Theatre. 

If you’re available and would like to be a part of the film, please contact amulliganfilm@gmail.com or message me directly. Please share to anyone else who you think may be interested. We can also provide catering on set for those involved 🙂

Looking forward to hearing from some of you,
Andrew

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'Extras Needed SHORT HORROR FILM WHERE: THE HOPE STREET THEATRE 22 HOPE ST. LIVERPOOL L1 9BY WHEN: THURSDAY 23RD JULY CALL TIME: 2PM EST. EST.END END TIME: 5PM WHAT'S REQUIRED: YOU WILL FORM PART OF AN AUDIENCE FOR A CHARACTER'S STAGE PERFORMANCE. WE ASK THAT YOU WEAR FORMAL ATTIRE (SUIT UIT/DRESS) WHAT'S PROVIDED: WHILST THIS IS AN UNPAID OPPORTUNITY, WE WILL PROVIDE FOOD AND FUNDS FOR BEVERAGES FROM THE NEIGHBOURING ARTS BAR Contact amulliganfilm@gmail.com or message me directly if youre interested:)'

items.title: Hi all,

items.text:
Are you a Samsung smartwatch and Samsung Health user who was gifted their watch by a family, friend, partner or loved one?

We’re looking for real Samsung users whose lives have been genuinely changed by the health features on their smartwatch or the Samsung Health app to appear in a global Samsung campaign.

✨ Filming: 1 day in mid-August

💰 Paid opportunity: Up to US$5,000

🏡 Plus a location fee if filming takes place in your home

🎥 No on-camera experience needed

If this sounds like you—or someone you know—we’d love to hear your story.

📩 Email apply@mcauleycasting.com with the subject line: Samsung Watch Gift

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

items.summary:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!
items.title: **Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

sharedPost.text:
🎭 JOIN THE CAST.

Following the success of our very first adult company production, we're opening our doors once again.

This is your chance to become part of Ensemble Productions and work towards our next exciting production.

Whether you've always dreamed of acting, trained before, or you're simply looking for a new challenge, everyone is welcome. No experience is necessary—just a willingness to learn, create and be part of something special.

✨ Performance opportunities�🎭 Weekly training�🤝 A welcoming, supportive company�🎬 A brand new production is waiting...

📍 Hampton Garden School�📅 Wednesday  9th September�🕡 6:30pm
⚠️ Limited places available.

Know someone who would love this? Tag them below! 👇

Every share helps us reach someone who's been waiting for the right moment to step on stage.

Could this be your sign? 🎭

Info.ensembleproductions@gmail.com

items.text:
Paid Casting Call 

Looking for MEN in their 20s/30s

We’re casting for a test filming of a new social dating show taking place in Hackney, London.

Filming will take place in the evening for roughly 6 hours. 

Participants will receive £100 payment. 

We’re looking for genuine people, comfortable on camera and open to participating in a fun, interactive dating format. 

This is a great opportunity to be part of an early-stage concept and help us shape the future of it.

If you’re interested, please send a message and we’ll be in touch with more details

items.title: Paid Casting Call

items.text:
✨ WE’RE HIRING PARTY ENTERTAINERS! ✨
Dinky Parties is growing, and we’re looking for enthusiastic, reliable and energetic male and female entertainers to join our fantastic team!

If you love working with children, enjoy performing, and want fun, flexible weekend work earning up to £120 per party, we’d love to hear from you!

🎉 About the role:

You’ll be hosting fun, high-energy children’s parties – leading games, dancing, and bringing characters such as princesses and superheroes to life. Every party is different, so you’ll need to be confident, adaptable and full of personality!

🌟 We’re looking for people who are:

• Friendly, confident and outgoing

• Organised and reliable

• Energetic and engaging

• Able to think on their feet and improvise

• Comfortable performing and dressing as characters

💫 Ideal experience:

• Experience working with children and a genuine passion for it

• Performing or acting experience (preferred but not essential)

• Full driving licence and access to a car

• DBS checked (or willing to obtain one)

📍 We welcome applicants based in London, Kent, Surrey and surrounding areas

✨ Why join Dinky Parties?

• Flexible weekend work

• Competitive pay (up to £120 per party)

• Full support and guidance provided

• A fun, supportive team environment

• The chance to create magical memories for children

✨ WE’RE HIRING PARTY ENTERTAINERS! ✨
Dinky Parties is growing, and we’re looking for enthusiastic, reliable and energetic male and female entertainers to join our fantastic team!

If you love working with children, enjoy performing, and want fun, flexible weekend work earning up to £120 per party, we’d love to hear from you!

🎉 About the role:

You’ll be hosting fun, high-energy children’s parties – leading games, dancing, and bringing characters such as princesses and superheroes to life. Every party is different, so you’ll need to be confident, adaptable and full of personality!

🌟 We’re looking for people who are:

• Friendly, confident and outgoing

• Organised and reliable

• Energetic and engaging

• Able to think on their feet and improvise

• Comfortable performing and dressing as characters

💫 Ideal experience:

• Experience working with children and a genuine passion for it

• Performing or acting experience (preferred but not essential)

• Full driving licence and access to a car

• DBS checked (or willing to obtain one)

📍 We welcome applicants based in London, Kent, Surrey and surrounding areas

✨ Why join Dinky Parties?

• Flexible weekend work

• Competitive pay (up to £120 per party)

• Full support and guidance provided

• A fun, supportive team environment

• The chance to create magical memories for children

If you think you’d be a great fit, we’d love to hear from you!

items.text:
UPDATE - I have closed submissions for now. If you got an email to send a submission tape, please do and I'll get back to you!

CASTING CALL — Paid Short Film in Colorado Springs

I’m casting two lead roles for an upcoming short film called **“Same Side.”**

It’s a grounded, emotional marriage drama about a husband and wife whose quiet dinner at home turns into an honest fight about money, parenting, exhaustion, being unseen, and whether they’re still on the same team.

This is a small, intimate, dialogue-heavy short — very performance-focused. Both actors carry the film, so this should be a strong opportunity for actors looking for real dramatic material and lead-role footage.

**Roles:**

**Husband** — Male, 30s–40s
A husband/father carrying work pressure, financial stress, and the fear that he’s failing his family. Needs restraint, vulnerability, frustration, and warmth.

**Wife** — Female, 30s–40s
A wife/mother who feels exhausted, unseen, and needed by everyone. Needs emotional honesty, strength, humor, and tenderness.

Open to all ethnicities. Most important thing is believable chemistry.

**Pay:** $200 per actor for the shoot day
**Location:** Colorado Springs
**Shoot:** One full day, date TBD
**Rehearsal/Chemistry Read:** TBD
**Meal provided**

To submit, please send a headshot/recent photo, reel or self-tape sample, acting experience/resume if available, and which role you’d like to be considered for. email caleb@calebpriceproductions.com and DM me here so I know to look for it.

Selected actors will be invited to a short in-person chemistry read.

topComments.text:
Ya know what sounds interesting to me? Piecing this idea into a 4 or 5 chapter feature: chapter 1: couple in their 20’s, chapter 2: couple in their 30’s, and so on. I’d love to play the wife in the 40’s/50’s chapter. 
If this resonates, happy to submit!?

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - TANISHA - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous.  Alt-punk or goth, Bisexual. **The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks. 

Shooting Schedule: August 15th & August 16th

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

topComments.text: This looks like fun.  Let me know if you need a 56 year old smart ass on a call.  Lol

We are CASTING for BLAKE, a REOCCURRING ROLE in The Staked Girls (the series) 

Title: The Staked Girls (The Series) 
Genre: Comedy/Horror 
Logline: After four boy-eating demon girls let a hunt get out of hand, they must find a way to trust again, or be doomed to starve on the stake
Role: Support (the bad guy!) 
Production Type: Student Film
Contact Information: stakedgirls@gmail.com 
Run Time: Short
Compensation: Unpaid. Credit, food, and fun are provided. 
Shooting Schedule: Self tape due Aug 15th, Callback late August. September and October shoots (TBD) 
Filming Location: Denver 
Project Description: Check us out on Instagram @stakedgirlstheseries. DM us to see the proof of concept. 

Remember when Charlie said “my ex-boyfriend stabbed me.” ? Yeah, that’s him. 

Please DM or email stakedgirls@gmail.com with your resume and headshot and we’ll get back to you with sides! Hope you’re okay with fake blood, black tar, and some light physical comedy. 

Looking forward to seeing you, demon boy.

# **HLEDÁME HERCE/NEHERCE DO REKLAMNÍ RODINKY**
**AUDIOVIZUÁLNÍ PREZENTAČNÍ SPOT PRO REALITNÍHO MAKLÉŘE**

Jedná se o natáčení propagačního spotu pro realitního makléře. Natáčení bude probíhat celý den **17. 7. 2026 v Praze**. Role jsou **honorované**.

**Sháníme členy rodiny:**
* **Maminka (40-50 let)**
* **Tatínek (40-50 let)**
* **Dcera - roztomilá holčička (5-8 let)**
* **Syn - teenager (14-18 let)**
* **Babička - (60+)**
* **Pejsek **

*Rodina se schází v obývacím pokoji, kde maminka začíná pociťovat úzkost z nedostatku prostoru. Tatínek se synem sledují v televizi sportovní přenos, zatímco do malého obýváku přichází babička s vnučkou a pejskem. Místnost se rychle zaplní a během chvíle v ní zavládne typický rodinný chaos.*

Herecké výkony nejsou náročné, bez dialogu. Preferujeme herce, přijímáme i neherce.

topComments.text: Im intrested im 49 at the end of the month.Pm

**KRAKÓW - ŚPIEWAJĄCY AKTORZY POSZUKIWANI - ZLECENIE DOBRZE PŁATNE - NOWA DATA **

**Wszystkie osoby, które już wysłały mi swoje zgłoszenie i są dostępne w nowym terminie - uprzejmie proszę o podbicie mi maila i potwierdzenie dostępności!**

Do spotu reklamowego dla producenta słodyczy poszukuję:

**- 2 kobiety młodsze (35-45 lat) // do 2 scen**

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne, ciepła energia, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe, spontaniczne, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (siostry / kuzynki)

- **mężczyzna (45-55 lat) // do 1 sceny**

aktor/ grający naturszczyk z doświadczeniem, naturalny i autentyczny, nie idealnie piękny / modelowy. Figura - lekko „zasiedziany home office”

- **dzieci:** **dziewczynka (około 7 lat) i chłopiec (około 10 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

grające - z doświadczeniem przed kamerą, naturalne, autentyczne, radosne i żywiołowe, potrafiące amatorsko tańczyć, możliwe podobieństwo fizyczne (rodzeństwo / kuzyni)

- **3 kobiety starsze (około 50 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, naturalne i autentyczne, bardzo pozytywne, nieskrępowane, żywiołowe, wyraźnie różniące się typem figury i urody, nie idealnie piękne / modelowe

- **babcia (około 70 lat) //** **do 1 sceny **

aktorki/ grający naturszczycy z doświadczeniem, miejska fajna babcia, z luzem i naturalnością, otwarta i z auto dystansem 

**Wymagana umiejętność u wszystkich – śpiew aktorski / dobry śpiew amatorski i doświadczenie przed kamerą!**

Role epizodyczne nie mówione ale śpiewane, na dalszym etapie castingu wybrane osoby poproszę o nagranie wskazanej piosenki. 

**Prawa na 5 lat bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, pola eksploatacji TV, internet, kino, radio, outdoor, POS. **

**Zdjęcia 10 sierpnia 2026 w Krakowie (okolicach)**. 

Nie zapewniamy noclegu, ewentualnie zwrot kosztów dojazdu (paliwa, bilety na pociąg).

Zgłoszenia wraz ze zdjęciami, wideo wizytówką i danymi do kontaktu proszę przesyłać na adres: ***castingotwarty@gmail.com ***w tytule proszę o wpisanie roli, do której się zgłaszacie. 

Nie przyjmuję zaproszeń do znajomych, nie wchodzę w 

konwersacje pod postem i na priv - skontaktuję się z wybranymi osobami.

Dziękuję :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and people smiling

items.text:
Casting Feature Film:  **HANDS WHICH SHED INNOCENT BLOOD**:

Shooting in Los Angeles - Oct./Nov. 2026   Must work Local

NON-UNION - Non-Paid — Copy; Credit; Meals

Please email resume, with updated pic; height; age range; link to reel please.

Ridgley.james@gmail.com

If selected - 1st Self-tape with sides

2nd - Live auditions.

Thank you SOOOO MUCHHHHHH!!!

**EMILY ROTH** — Female, 22. A classically trained violinist with a voluptuous figure and homely face, arriving in LA from the Midwest. Naive, awkward, and endearingly flustered in social situations — prone to word-fumbling and self-deprecating humor. Beneath that vulnerability lives cold, calculating menace and a buried rage that can surface without warning. Must play comic vulnerability and genuine danger with equal conviction. Violin performance skills a plus.

**PETER** — Male, 27. Wiry, quirky-cute, and nerdish. A self-contained, tech-savvy loner with a warm romantic side and a quietly dangerous undercurrent. Socially awkward but deeply perceptive, with a fiercely protective streak. Must balance genuine sweetness with controlled menace.

**XAVIER** — Male, 30s. Soap-star handsome with a charming surface and a cold, cunning interior. Carries an easy sneer and turns intimidating quickly. Fundamentally a predator dressed as a landlord.

**CHLOE** — Female, 30s. Blonde, outwardly ditzy and warm, but shrewd and calculating underneath. Can shift from sisterly to threatening in an instant. Sharp comic timing essential.

**AIDEN** — Male, late 20s–30s. Jim Morrison looks — magnetic, loud, crude, and self-destructive. Sexually aggressive with rare flashes of genuine feeling. Rockstar energy required.

**JASMINE** — Female (trans). Warm, plainspoken, and grounded — the moral compass of the piece. Genuine dignity and emotional intelligence are essential to the role.

**DETECTIVE ROBBINS** — Male, late 40s–mid 50s. Heavyset and grizzled. A no-nonsense, straight-talking cop with a cigarette perpetually on his lip. Dogged and suspicious, with occasional flashes of empathy.

**GORDON ROTH** — Male, 50s. Nick Nolte type — sandy-haired, weathered, and beaten. Fiercely loving toward his daughter; cold and dangerous to everyone else.

**VINCE DEMATTO** — Male, 30s. Slick and well-dressed. Predatory under a smooth, confident charm. Featured role.

**STEVE HANSEN** — Male, mid-30s. Clean-cut and polished — more Harvard lawyer than creative. Charismatic and manipulative. Featured role.

**DETECTIVE HERNANDEZ** — Any gender, age open. Professional and steady. Small recurring supporting role.

items.text:
Casting Call for my film platform, Voyager Company’s Acting Art Team

*Non-Paid but food and beverages will be provided

Production primarily taking place in Chicagoland, IL.

Learn more at the Casting Call’s official post at the V.C. website:

https://vcfilms.weebly.com/casting-calls/intro-to-voyager-companys-acting-art-team-non-paid

sharedPost.text:
A look at past short films released and unreleased with some clips recycled for more experimentation in the editing process by myself. The goal was to prime myself for ideas that would match some of what I want to do in the future. 

The good news is that I can continue my cinematic experimentation with others for the VC Acting Art Team - which now has a casting call currently up at the the VC platform Casting Call page! Link in bio. 

I’ve got two actresses now joined and so there are 6 spots left for 2 more actresses and 4 actors. This is non-paid for now but there will always be food and beverages provided by myself. 💕

The following are featured in order for these clips: @alannah_swenka (Severance), @calliehlers (Failed Movements project), Myself experimenting years ago with special effects for a short action film series, My glass in a micro short tribute I did for Blade Runner 2049, and @benjamin.scott for a short we shot years ago. I do want to say Calli was so sweet to work with as well as everyone here 💕❤️

Fun fact: That’s Calli as an animated A.I. generation fused then dissolving into a live action clip of herself! 
I would like to learn how to keep doing this. It’s imperative as we enter a world with A.I sort of dominating it, that we find innovate ways into weaving it with our industries. That shot was a chance for me to learn how to pioneer something unique using A.I. within filmmaking. The other clips don’t use A.I. 

#cinema #art #media #entertainment #film

items.text:
Jodi Purdy Casting Director

CASTING CALL!!

ADDITIONAL ROLES HAVE BEEN ADDED & SARAH CAN BE 30’s - 40’s & MARK CAN BE 40’s - 50’s.  THE CHAIRMAN’S BREAKDOWN HAS BEEN EXPANDED.

Seeking Non-Union Actors & Actresses to submit for the below captioned roles for an Independent Feature Film 
Written & Directed by David J. McDivitt

“NIGHT WATCH”

Filming: Medford, MA
August 2026
Compensation: TBD

Submit the following via Google Drive or Email Attachment to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject: NIGHT WATCH – [ROLE] – [YOUR NAME]

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos 
Acting Resume
Reels - if available
Links - if available 
1 minute Introduction Video

Questions? Send in Email! Not Facebook Messenger! Not in Comments!

ROLES:

SARAH (Lead)
Female | 30’s - 40’s | Caucasian

A Vanguard Financial administrator whose Christmas is shattered when a hit squad invades her home and forces her to use her Level 5 server access. 
Terrified, intelligent, protective, and deeply devoted to her husband. Sarah is one of the film’s most layered characters, balancing vulnerability with extraordinary strength.

MARK (Lead) 
Male | 40s - 50’s | Caucasian

A recently retired detective held captive and tortured during the home invasion. Calm under pressure, morally grounded, and impossible to break. His battle with the antagonist is one of philosophy and willpower as much as survival.

NEW ROLES:

CHARACTER: GRANDPA (JOHN)

Supporting / Day Player | Male, 60s–70s
Sarah’s father — easygoing, affectionate, happy to play along with the family’s Christmas morning routine.

CHARACTER: GRANDMA (BETTE)

Supporting / Day Player | Female, 60s–70s
Sarah’s mother — warm, doting, a little blunt, thrilled to whisk the grandkids off to New York for the holiday.

CHARACTER: LILY
Supporting / Day Player | Female, 11 - Caucasian
Sarah and Mark’s daughter — bright, a little bossy with her younger brother, excited for the trip.

CHARACTER: LEO
Supporting / Day Player | Male, 8
Sarah and Mark’s son — playful, a little mischievous with his older sister, excited for the trip.

EXPANDED CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

THE CHAIRMAN

Previous: Male, 60s. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control.

Few lines – but every word carries enormous weight.

Lean further into old-money excess and detachment – a man so insulated by wealth that household staff attend to his most basic personal needs. Imperious, entitled, and thoroughly out of touch with ordinary life. Still sophisticated and controlled on the surface; the disconnection from reality should read as absolute, unexamined comfort, not cartoonish villainy.

ONE (Lead/Antagonist)
Male | 40s | Open Ethnicity
 
The brilliant, philosophical leader of the hit squad. Calm, precise, and chillingly intelligent. He doesn’t see himself as a villain—he believes he’s correcting a broken system. Looking for an actor who can command a scene through quiet confidence rather than intimidation.

BENNY (Supporting)
Male | 20s | Open Ethnicity 

A young security guard with a passion for technology and cybersecurity. Friendly, funny, and genuinely likable. Benny unexpectedly becomes one of the story’s emotional anchors.

THE CHAIRMAN - (Supporting)
Male | 60s | Caucasian

The unseen power behind the operation. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control. Few lines—but every word carries enormous weight. A memorable role for a seasoned actor.

HACKER (Supporting)
Female | 20s–30s | Open Ethnicity

The technical specialist of the hit squad. Brilliant, fearless, and physically capable. Sharp-witted with a dry sense of humor, she’s completely at home inside the server room—and dangerous in a fight.

BRUNO (Supporting)
Male | 30s–40s | Open Ethnicity

The team’s physical enforcer. Tough, impulsive, and impatient. Beneath the muscle is a man carrying personal pain and quiet regret, giving the character surprising emotional depth.

Jodi Purdy Casting Director

CASTING CALL!!

ADDITIONAL ROLES HAVE BEEN ADDED & SARAH CAN BE 30’s - 40’s & MARK CAN BE 40’s - 50’s.  THE CHAIRMAN’S BREAKDOWN HAS BEEN EXPANDED.

Seeking Non-Union Actors & Actresses to submit for the below captioned roles for an Independent Feature Film 
Written & Directed by David J. McDivitt

“NIGHT WATCH”

Filming: Medford, MA
August 2026
Compensation: TBD

Submit the following via Google Drive or Email Attachment to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject: NIGHT WATCH – [ROLE] – [YOUR NAME]

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos 
Acting Resume
Reels - if available
Links - if available 
1 minute Introduction Video

Questions? Send in Email! Not Facebook Messenger! Not in Comments!

ROLES:

SARAH (Lead)
Female | 30’s - 40’s | Caucasian

A Vanguard Financial administrator whose Christmas is shattered when a hit squad invades her home and forces her to use her Level 5 server access. 
Terrified, intelligent, protective, and deeply devoted to her husband. Sarah is one of the film’s most layered characters, balancing vulnerability with extraordinary strength.

MARK (Lead) 
Male | 40s - 50’s | Caucasian

A recently retired detective held captive and tortured during the home invasion. Calm under pressure, morally grounded, and impossible to break. His battle with the antagonist is one of philosophy and willpower as much as survival.

NEW ROLES:

CHARACTER: GRANDPA (JOHN)

Supporting / Day Player | Male, 60s–70s

Sarah’s father — easygoing, affectionate, happy to play along with the family’s Christmas morning routine.

CHARACTER: GRANDMA (BETTE)

Supporting / Day Player | Female, 60s–70s

Sarah’s mother — warm, doting, a little blunt, thrilled to whisk the grandkids off to New York for the holiday.

CHARACTER: LILY
Supporting / Day Player | Female, 11 - Caucasian

Sarah and Mark’s daughter — bright, a little bossy with her younger brother, excited for the trip.

CHARACTER: LEO
Supporting / Day Player | Male, 8

Sarah and Mark’s son — playful, a little mischievous with his older sister, excited for the trip.

EXPANDED CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

THE CHAIRMAN

Previous: Male, 60s. Sophisticated, elegant, and completely in control.

Few lines – but every word carries enormous weight.

Lean further into old-money excess and detachment – a man so insulated by wealth that household staff attend to his most basic personal needs. Imperious, entitled, and thoroughly out of touch with ordinary life. Still sophisticated and controlled on the surface; the disconnection from reality should read as absolute, unexamined comfort, not cartoonish villainy.

Male | 40s | Open Ethnicity

BRUNO (Supporting)
Male | 30s–40s | Open Ethnicity

The team’s physical enforcer. Tough, impulsive, and impatient. Beneath the muscle is a man carrying personal pain and quiet regret, giving the character surprising emotional depth.

Filming currently (22nd July to 25th July)

items.text:
**Actors, writers and directors - I’d really value your input.**

I’m building **ALD Theatre**, a new London-based development programme for actors, writers and directors. It will combine new writing, audience-led redirection, filmed theatre showreel scenes, and creative development sessions.

The aim is to create something practical and collaborative: a place where actors can perform, writers and directors can develop work, and participants can build useful material and connections rather than simply attending another passive networking event.

I’m currently testing the idea before taking it further, and I’ve put together a short survey for actors, writers, directors and producers.

It only takes a couple of minutes, and there’s no commitment or sales pitch attached. Honest responses, positive or negative, would be extremely useful**!**

**Complete the survey here:**
https://forms.gle/RzLNiMAPRqnRtoaP9

London-based responses are particularly helpful, but I’d also be interested to hear from people elsewhere in the UK.

**Follow ALD Theatre for updates as the project develops.**
www.ALDTheatre.uk
items.previewDescription: Welcome to A Little Different Theatre, a brand new professional development programme for actors, directors and writers.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - UPDATE

THIS ROLE HAS BEEN CAST

Thank you to all the wonderful ladies who submitted. It was a tough decision. 🌼

Looking for actress to portray grandmother for short film. 

Genre: Drama
Status: Non Union
Compensation: Paid with IMDb credit

Role: Grandmother with gray hair. Age: 60s-80s

All mos, no dialogue 

Films July 31 in Aurora, CO

If interested, please send headshot to:

stacyinfilm@gmail.com

topComments.text: Holly K Zeleny has been my movie wife a couple times.
